creator: kt315@bigmir.net
text:
Hi!
I want say, that we switch our clock to winter time at last time. And we never turn back to the summer time.
You can se it there - http://www.timegenie.com/city.time/uaiev , http://24timezones.com/current_local/ukraine_time.php

Our clock was switched 30 october at 04:00 AM ( DST ends on Sunday 30 October 2011, 04:00 Ukraine daylight time )

So, our TZ is UTC+2.

This concerns the following time zones in tz database:

Europe/Kiev
Europe/Uzhgorod
Europe/Zaporozhye
Europe/Simferopol
